01-status-badges.title: Status Labels
01-status-badges.description: Inline status labels alongside text content, such as document or workflow states.

02-icon-position.title: Icon Position
02-icon-position.description: Icons placed on the left or right of the label — left for status/type indicators, right for directional cues.

03-selectable-tags.title: Selectable Tags
03-selectable-tags.description: Icon-prefixed tags that toggle active state, e.g. for filtering or labeling.

04-dismissible.title: Dismissible Tags
04-dismissible.description: Applied label chips in a multi-select input or filter bar that can be individually removed.

05-semantic-colors.title: Semantic Colors
05-semantic-colors.description: Badges styled with design system semantic color tokens for success, warning, danger, info, and accent states.
